menu_paths: IntelliDealer Menus > Product Support > Parts Product Support > Parts Profile: Listing
Product Support > Parts > Parts Profile. - Parts Profile

fields.name: Part
fields.description: The part number assigned to the selected part. Number Hover over the Part Number on the search results to display the options to View or Copy the entry.

fields.name: Search
fields.description: Search for parts by entering a search option. Use this optional field to search using a key word.

fields.name: Vendor
fields.description: The vendor number that supplies the part.

fields.name: Source
fields.description: The part's source of supply code. This typically represents the part's originating warehouse location.

security_switch: 603 - Purchase Orders relate to units (Equipment Profile) and other
menu_paths: IntelliDealer Menus > Financial Management > Accounts Payable > Purchase Orders

fields.name: Type
fields.description: Sort the search results by PO type.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Sort the search results by PO status.

fields.name: All
fields.description: Search through all status options.

fields.name: PO Request
fields.description: The PO has been created and saved, but has not been submitted for Authorization.

fields.name: Waiting for
fields.description: The PO is waiting for the approval of the supervisor Authorization (the PO system user with the proper authority).

fields.name: Authorized
fields.description: A supervisor has approved the PO, but it has not been submitted to the vendor.

fields.name: On Order
fields.description: The PO has been authorized and sent to the vendor. On Order POs do not have any items received or canceled.

fields.name: Select PO
fields.description: A unique PO number. Number
